seoTitle: Windy vs Wingadee — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Windy and Wingadee. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Windy and Wingadee.
heading: Windy vs Wingadee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Windy, New South Wales and Wingadee, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Windy has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wingadee (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Windy or Wingadee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Windy has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wingadee scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Windy scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Wingadee scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Windy or Wingadee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Windy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
